description: UPDATED Edge Doctrine (replaces prior copy at ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/EDGE_DOCTRINE.md). Adds Addendum A (win-rate and edge COEXIST -- both rise together when the READ sharpens at fixed geometry; only the geometry-seesaw is forbidden; win-rate is a first-class read-quality measure) and Addendum B (RETROSPECTIVE INTELLIGENCE -- the system contemplates its own record every period across six questions: losses taken and their signature, wins missed, over/under-weighted features, why it was correct, the unfixed residual relationship, and the calibration of its own attention; a permanent self-improvement reflex feeding new Change Warrants).
